desc: Exports clash results to a Word-ready HTML report with embedded screenshots.
summary: Exports clash results to a Word-ready HTML report with embedded screenshots. The HTML file can be opened directly in Microsoft Word (File → Open → .html) and retained as .docx via Word's native save. A parallel .doc copy is written alongside for double-click-open compatibility (Word opens .doc files natively, including HTML-flavoured .doc from this writer).
usecase: User wants a formatted Word document of QA results for coordination review.
notfor: Raw data export — use CSV or XML for that.
precondition: Active document must be saved with QA results available.

successprompts: Word report saved to {path}. Open with Word → File → Open.
